description_long: This is a rectangular, industrial-style outdoor air conditioning unit, primarily constructed from metal with a weathered, off-white finish. The front face features a large circular grille for air intake or exhaust, composed of closely spaced horizontal slats, and a smaller access panel with the Mitsubishi Heavy Industries logo in red and black. The top surface is flat with subtle paneling and a raised section, likely for internal access or component housing. The sides are plain, with some minor panel detailing and visible signs of dirt and wear, indicating prolonged outdoor exposure. The unit is robust and boxy, designed to be mounted against a wall or on a platform, with no visible wheels or handles for portability. Its utilitarian design and branding suggest it is intended for commercial or residential building exteriors.
description: A weathered, boxy Mitsubishi outdoor air conditioner with a large front grille, off-white metal casing, and industrial detailing.
description_view_0: The left side is plain with minimal panel detailing and visible weathering.
description_view_1: The front view shows the large circular grille, Mitsubishi logo, and access panel, making it the most detailed and interactive side.
description_view_2: The right side is similar to the left, plain with subtle panel lines and some dirt marks.
description_view_3: The grille dominates this view, showing the horizontal slats and the full intake/exhaust area.
attribute_brand_logo: A red Mitsubishi logo with three diamonds and black text, located on the upper right of the front panel.
attribute_grille_pattern: Large circular grille with closely spaced horizontal slats, covering most of the front left side.
attribute_control_panel_location: Front right, integrated into the access panel below the logo.
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: Single large circular vent with horizontal slats on the front left; exhaust and intake are likely combined in this grille.
